name: Killer Fish
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. You have the ability of your recently killed player.
flavor: "Killer fish. Killer fish from San Diego. I don't know what I am, but I taste really good. I make killer fish. Hello. I'll be your killer fish for the evening. Thank you." (v1.0)
otherNightReminder: The Killer Fish chooses a player. :reminder: :reminder:
